gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: We've pruned a few broken links from the community app showcase to keep the garden healthy and easy to navigate.
gist.summary: Automated cleanup removing three inactive community apps from the showcase directory.
gist.impact: Users browsing the app showcase will experience fewer broken links and 404 errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, gently pruning dead leaves from a vibrant digital plant to keep the garden healthy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, gently pruning withered pixelated leaves from a glowing lime green (#ecf874) code-plant. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
